description_long: This is a gaming laptop with a black chassis, featuring a large RGB-backlit keyboard and a wide screen. The lid displays the MSI logo and two angular RGB light strips, giving it a distinctive, high-tech appearance. The laptop is accompanied by a wired gaming mouse and a mouse pad, both positioned to the right of the keyboard. The keyboard area includes several stickers and a touchpad, while the rear and sides of the laptop show multiple ports for connectivity. The overall design is sleek and modern, with sharp edges and a robust build. The RGB lighting on both the keyboard and lid enhances its visual appeal, making it stand out in urban or gaming environments.
description: A black MSI gaming laptop with RGB lighting, accompanied by a wired mouse and mouse pad. Features a colorful backlit keyboard, prominent MSI logo, and multiple connectivity ports.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the open screen, RGB keyboard, stickers, and the mouse with pad on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the MSI logo, RGB light strips on the lid, and visible ports at the back.
description_view_2: Left-side view emphasizing the thin profile, RGB keyboard, and the open screen.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the keyboard, touchpad, and the mouse setup, with the screen open and dark.
attribute_brand_logo: The MSI logo is visible on the center of the laptop lid, featuring a white 'msi' text above a red dragon shield emblem, both illuminated by RGB light strips.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and appears to be off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard layout is QWERTY with a full function row and RGB backlighting; a numeric keypad is present on the right side.
attribute_sticker_placement: Multiple stickers are present on the right palm rest area, displaying branding and specifications.
